policies.title: School District Legal Status
policies.description_short: Conroe ISD operates as a public school district established under Texas law, giving it the authority to provide free education to students in the community.

policies.title: Hate Crimes
policies.description_short: Conroe ISD takes hate crimes seriously and works with law enforcement when a crime motivated by bias or prejudice occurs on or near school property.
